subcodes.first_line: I praise Thee, O Thou Remover of Sorrows, Overlooker of faults, Rejoicer of hearts and Illuminator of faces! Verily to the beloved ones at the door of Thy oneness
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement
